title: Verify Postilion Transaction Processing Health

realtime_monitor_checks.description: Verify nodes, connectivity, and overall Postilion system health

verify_node_status.expected: All working Nodes gray, arrows black

transaction_query_checks.description: Validate transaction flow using Postilion queries

steps.navigate_query_console: Queries → Transactions → Operational Query → Last 10 Transactions

steps.filter_nodes: Source Node = Any, Sink Node = Any

steps.search_transactions: Click Search multiple times to verify flow

steps.verify_response_codes: Response Code field should show zeros ('0') for approved transactions

trace_monitoring.description: Monitor transaction flow traces for abnormal patterns

steps.reset_traces: Turn traces off, clear all, turn them back on

steps.monitor_abnormal_patterns: Check for timeout errors or rejections

event_log_checks.description: Check Postilion event logs for errors and warnings

steps.monitor_errors: Look for error events and system warnings

license_verification.description: Ensure licenses are valid and not expired

sql_server_health.description: Verify SQL Server memory, services, and database connection health

checks.memory_usage: Monitor SQL Server memory usage on Postilion servers

HEALTHY.description: All nodes gray, arrows black, continuous transaction flow, approval rate >99.5%, no critical errors

DEGRADED.description: Intermittent transaction failures, some nodes yellow, approval rate 95-99.5%, non-critical warnings

UNHEALTHY.description: Transaction flow stopped, critical nodes red/offline, approval rate <95%, multiple critical errors

escalation_procedure.immediate: Check SQL Server memory, restart if >90% (SOP-B-010)
escalation_procedure.within_5_minutes: Restart Postilion services if nodes red

documentation.description: Maintain detailed logs for monitoring and auditing

notes: License expiry can cause complete outage
SQL Server memory issues are common cause of problems
Coordinate with ZSS operations for escalations
